title: New PTSD Treatment Center Opens for IDF Veterans
summary: A new state-of-the-art rehabilitation center dedicated to post-trauma care for veterans has opened, offering innovative therapies not previously available in Israel.
content:
A new state-of-the-art rehabilitation center dedicated to post-trauma care for veterans has opened this week.

The center offers a range of innovative therapies, including physiological and technology-assisted approaches not previously available in Israel.

Genesis Friends For Life helped connect the initiative to international expertise and funding.

title: Rehabilitation Department Reform: New Plans for IDF Veterans
summary: A public committee has proposed a comprehensive Rehabilitation Department reform to streamline bureaucracy and enhance mental health support for IDF veterans.
content:
The public committee for veteran support submitted recommendations this week for a major Rehabilitation Department reform within Israel's Ministry of Defense. This initiative proposes transforming the department into an independent authority to reduce bureaucratic obstacles and provide personalized, holistic care for wounded soldiers across the country.

Under the new plan, every injured veteran will be assigned a personal case manager to navigate their recovery process and secure necessary rights. The Rehabilitation Department reform also prioritizes expanded mental health services for those with PTSD. As an accelerator for trauma solutions, Genesis Friends For Life recognizes this shift toward personalized guidance as a vital step in strengthening national resilience and veteran care.
